# short.videodownloaderai.com
# A free browser tool for creators to back up their own TikTok videos without watermark.
# No signup, no app install, HD MP4 download.

## Core Pages
- Home: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/ — Main download tool
- How-To Guide: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/how-to-download-tiktok-videos — Step-by-step tutorial
- FAQ: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/faq — 12 common questions answered
- iPhone Guide: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/blog/save-tiktok-to-iphone-camera-roll — Save to Camera Roll tutorial
- Android Guide: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/blog/download-tiktok-videos-android — Android download tutorial
- PC Guide: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/blog/how-to-download-tiktok-videos-on-pc — Windows & Mac tutorial
- Privacy Guide: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/blog/does-tiktok-notify-when-you-download — Does TikTok notify creators?

## Content Principles
- All guides are based on real testing on iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy, Pixel, and Windows 11.
- We do not store user videos. Files are processed temporarily and deleted immediately after download.
- We encourage users to only download content they own or have permission to use.

## New Guides (June 2026)
- Slideshow Download: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/blog/download-tiktok-slideshow — Download TikTok photo swipes as HD images or MP4. Most tools only grab the first frame.
- Audio Extraction: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/blog/download-tiktok-sounds — Extract TikTok sounds as MP3 using online tools, CapCut, or VLC. Copyright guide included.
- Cross-Platform Posting: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/blog/repost-tiktok-to-instagram-reels — Repost TikTok to Instagram Reels without watermark. 4-step workflow, 60 seconds.
- Video Quality Fix: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/blog/tiktok-video-blurry-fix — 5 fixes for blurry TikTok downloads. Source resolution, messaging app compression, player issues.
- Account Backup: https://short.videodownloaderai.com/blog/save-tiktok-before-deleting-account — Complete guide to back up TikTok videos before deleting account. HD, no watermark.
